items.title: How Endava is redesigning software delivery around AI agents
items.lead_paragraph: Learn how Endava is using AI agents, ChatGPT Enterprise, and Codex to accelerate software delivery, automate workflows, and build an AI-native culture across the enterprise.

items.title: Dreaming: Better memory for a more helpful ChatGPT
items.lead_paragraph: ChatGPT introduces a new memory system to better remember preferences, keeping context fresh and relevant across conversations.

items.title: Biodefense in the Intelligence Age
items.lead_paragraph: An action plan for AI-powered biological resilience

items.title: Introducing new capabilities to GPT-Rosalind
items.lead_paragraph: GPT-Rosalind advances life sciences research with enhanced biological reasoning, medicinal chemistry expertise, genomics analysis, and experimental workflow capabilities.

items.title: How Wasmer used Codex to build a Node.js runtime for the edge
items.lead_paragraph: See how Wasmer used Codex with GPT-5.5 to build a Node.js runtime for the edge, accelerating development 10x to 20x and shipping in weeks instead of months.

items.title: A blueprint for democratic governance of frontier AI
items.lead_paragraph: OpenAI outlines a blueprint for U.S. governance of frontier AI, proposing a federal framework for safety, resilience, and national security.

items.title: OpenAI public policy agenda
items.lead_paragraph: OpenAI outlines its public policy agenda for AI, including safety, youth protection, workforce transition, and global standards to ensure AI benefits society.

items.title: Travelers deploys AI-powered claims countrywide with OpenAI
items.lead_paragraph: Travelers built an AI-powered Claim Assistant with OpenAI to guide customers through filing claims, provide 24/7 support, and scale operations during peak demand.

items.title: Codex for every role, tool, and workflow
items.lead_paragraph: Discover new Codex plugins, sites, and annotations that help analysts, marketers, designers, investors, and other teams get more done with AI.

items.title: Advancing youth safety and opportunity through global leadership
items.lead_paragraph: OpenAI calls for global action on youth AI safety, proposing an international institute to strengthen safeguards, standards, and opportunities for young people.

items.title: Codex is becoming a productivity tool for everyone
items.lead_paragraph: The Next Era of Knowledge Work report explores how Codex is transforming productivity through AI-powered research, data analysis, workflow automation, and content creation.

items.title: Our views on AI policy and political advocacy
items.lead_paragraph: Our approach to AI policy and political advocacy, transparency, support for thoughtful regulation and AI safety, and that no outside political group speaks on the company’s behalf.

items.title: Building the infrastructure for the Intelligence Age in Michigan
items.lead_paragraph: OpenAI breaks ground on a 1GW data center project in Michigan as part of Stargate, building AI infrastructure to expand access, create jobs, and support communities.

items.title: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now available on AWS
items.lead_paragraph: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now generally available on AWS, giving enterprises a new path to build with OpenAI through the AWS environments, controls, and procurement workflows they already use. Customers can get started with OpenAI on AWS and move faster from evaluation to production.

items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: The full text of Chris Olah's remarks on the Pope's encyclical on AI.

items.title: Widening the conversation on frontier AI
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: Over the past several months, we’ve been organizing dialogues with groups whose work and traditions bear on the questions raised by AI.

items.title: What we learned mapping a year’s worth of AI-enabled cyber threats
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: As AI transforms the nature of and methods behind cyberattacks, how well do the techniques and frameworks used by the security community hold up? In a new report, we seek to answer that question.

items.title: Introducing the Services Track and Partner Hub of the Claude Partner Network
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: In March, we launched the Claude Partner Network, a program for the firms that help enterprises put Claude into production.. Today, we’re announcing two new components that make this ecosystem easier for customers to navigate.

items.title: Expanding Project Glasswing
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries

items.title: Anthropic confidentially submits draft S-1 to the SEC
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: Anthropic has confidentially submitted a draft S-1 registration statement to the Securities and Exchange Commission

items.title: Anthropic raises $65B in Series H funding at $965B post-money valuation
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: Anthropic has raised $65 billion in Series H funding led by Altimeter Capital, Dragoneer, Greenoaks, and Sequoia Capital.

items.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8
items.author: Anthropic
items.lead_paragraph: Our latest model, Claude Opus 4.8, is an upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consistency to handle long-running work.
